prompt_sets.purpose: Offline deterministic demo generation plus optional first-scene LLM polish.
notes: The optional LLM polish pass may rewrite only the first background block while preserving anchor substrings.
Prompt metadata is stored for traceability; secrets and .env values must never be written here.

prompts.system_summary: Polish one vertical mobile text adventure scene and return JSON only without changing IDs, structure, choices, or state keys.
prompts.user_task_summary: Rewrite the first background block in concise Chinese while preserving all required anchor substrings exactly.
